title: Cheesy Chicken Strudel
ingredients: 4 whole chicken breasts, cooked and diced
2 tbsp. chicken broth (can use broth from poaching chicken)
¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper
2/3 cup dried bread crumbs (prefer Progresso Garlic and Herb)
instructions: In medium skillet, saute chopped onion and mushrooms in oil until tender and liquid is absorbed.  Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.  Remove skillet from heat and let cool for 15 – 20 minutes.  Stir in cheese, broth, Greek seasoning, pepper, egg and chicken until well combined.  Set aside.

Place 1 sheet phyllo dough on waxed paper.  Brush phyllo with melted butter and sprinkle with 1 tbsp. bread crumbs.  Layer with 4 more sheets of phyllo, brushing each sheet with butter and sprinkling with bread crumbs.  Spoon 1/4 of chicken mixture in 2 inch strip along bottom length of phyllo.  Roll phyllo dough jellyroll fashion.  Place on lightly greased cookie sheet.  Score diagonally 3-4 times with sharp knife.  Brush with butter and sprinkle with paprika.  Repeat with remaining ingredients to make a total of 4 rolls.  (Rolls may be made ahead at this point and refrigerated.  Cover tightly with plastic wrap.  Add 5 additional minutes to baking time if refrigerated.)  Bake at 375 degrees for 15 – 20 minutes.  Serves 8 – 10.
